AT.title: IQ Gateway software release notes (8.3.5286)

AU.countries_text: Australia and New Zealand # Feature classification Feature Description 1 Issue resolution Bug fixes Fixes an issue where the IQ Gateway software does not apply the default Power Export Limit (PEL) from the CSIP server to the grid profile, resulting in the system not adhering to the CSIP PEL command Fixes an issue where the ERPI IEEE 2030.5 Client in the IQ Gateway software becomes unresponsive if the CSIP server does not respond to the Client’s initial message Fixes an issue where the Master Resource Identifier (MRID) assigned to each Mirror Usage Point is not unique, causing parsing errors or making the IEEE 2030.5 client unresponsive Addresses unhandled error messages encountered by the IEEE 2030.5 client in the IQ Gateway software and implements timeout handling and retry mechanisms Fixes an issue where the single-phase site reports zero values for the unused phases of multi-phase voltage readings, instead of omitting the unused phases Fixes an issue where CSIP PEL commands fail to reduce Production output on IQ8 Microinverters in an IQ7 and IQ8 (Mixed) Microinverter system under the 2030.5 profile This release is being deployed via an over-the-air update to sites in Australia and New Zealand. Gateways supported : IQ Gateway Metered Microinverters supported : IQ8 Series Microinverters IQ7 Series Microinverters S Series Microinverters Batteries supported : IQ Battery 5P IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase System controllers supported: IQ System Controller 3 INT Supported system configurations : Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters, and IQ Gateway Metered or IQ System Controller 3 INT Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only systems with IQ7 Series Microinverters and/or S Series Microinverters, and IQ Gateway Metered or IQ System Controller 3 INT Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters and IQ7 Series Microinverters (Mixed), and IQ Gateway Metered or IQ System Controller 3 INT Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only systems with compatible third-party string inverters, and IQ Gateway Metered Grid-tied (without backup) solar and storage systems with IQ7 Series Microinverters and/or S Series Microinverters or compatible third-party string inverters, and IQ Gateway Metered, and ACB1.0/ACB1.5 Grid-tied (without backup) solar and storage systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters or IQ7 Series Microinverters and/or S Series Microinverters or third-party string inverters, IQ Gateway Metered, and IQ Battery 5P Grid-tied (without backup) solar and storage systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters, IQ7 Series Microinverters (Mixed), IQ Gateway Metered, and IQ Battery 5P Grid-forming (with backup) solar and storage systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters or IQ7 Series Microinverters and/or S Series Microinverters, IQ System Controller 3 INT, and IQ Battery 5P Grid-forming (with backup) solar and storage systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters and IQ7 Series Microinverters (Mixed), IQ System Controller 3 INT, and IQ Battery 5P Grid-tied (without backup) solar and storage systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters, IQ Battery 5P or IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase, and IQ Gateway Metered. Grid-tied (without backup) solar and storage systems with IQ7 Series Microinverters and/or S Series Microinverters, IQ Battery 5P or IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase, and IQ Gateway Metered Grid-tied (without backup) solar and storage systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters and IQ7 Series Microinverters (Mixed), IQ Battery 5P or IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase, and IQ Gateway Metered Grid-tied (without backup) solar and storage systems with compatible third-party string inverters, IQ Battery 5P or IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase, and IQ Gateway Metered Grid-forming (with backup) solar and storage systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters, IQ Battery 5P or IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase, and IQ System Controller 3 INT Grid-forming (with backup) solar and storage systems with IQ7 Series Microinverters and/or S Series Microinverters, IQ Battery 5P or IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase, and IQ System Controller 3 INT Grid-forming (with backup) solar and storage systems with IQ8 Series Microinverters and IQ7 Series Microinverters (Mixed), IQ Battery 5P or IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase, and IQ System Controller 3 INT

IN.countries_text: India, South Africa, and Thailand # Feature classification Feature Description 1 New feature Support for IQ8 and IQ7 Series mixed systems Supports backward compatibility of IQ8 Series Microinverters in an existing IQ7 Series systems on the same IQ Gateway, only in the following configurations. Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only systems Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Plus Batteries systems with IQ Battery 5P Note : IQ7 Series Microinverters cannot be added to a site with existing IQ8 Series Microinverters on the same gateway. This release is being deployed via remote software upgrades for IQ8 and IQ7 Series (mixed) grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only and grid-tied (with backup) Solar Plus Batteries systems after completion of commissioning via the Enphase Installer App. Gateways supported : IQ Gateway Metered Microinverters supported : IQ8 Series and IQ7 Series Batteries supported : IQ Battery 5P Supported system configurations : Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only systems with IQ8 Series and IQ7 Series Microinverters (mixed), and IQ Gateway Metered Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Plus Batteries systems with IQ8 Series and IQ7 Series (mixed) Microinverters, IQ Gateway Metered, and IQ Battery 5P
IN.summary: IQ Gateway software version 8.3.5058 provides backward compatibility for IQ8 Series Microinverters in an existing IQ7 Series systems. ZA.countries_text: India, South Africa, and Thailand # Feature classification Feature Description 1 New feature Support for IQ8 and IQ7 Series mixed systems Supports backward compatibility of IQ8 Series Microinverters in an existing IQ7 Series systems on the same IQ Gateway, only in the following configurations. Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only systems Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Plus Batteries systems with IQ Battery 5P Note : IQ7 Series Microinverters cannot be added to a site with existing IQ8 Series Microinverters on the same gateway. This release is being deployed via remote software upgrades for IQ8 and IQ7 Series (mixed) grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only and grid-tied (with backup) Solar Plus Batteries systems after completion of commissioning via the Enphase Installer App. Gateways supported : IQ Gateway Metered Microinverters supported : IQ8 Series and IQ7 Series Batteries supported : IQ Battery 5P Supported system configurations : Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Only systems with IQ8 Series and IQ7 Series Microinverters (mixed), and IQ Gateway Metered Grid-tied (without backup) Solar Plus Batteries systems with IQ8 Series and IQ7 Series (mixed) Microinverters, IQ Gateway Metered, and IQ Battery 5P
ZA.summary: IQ Gateway software version 8.3.5058 provides backward compatibility for IQ8 Series Microinverters in an existing IQ7 Series systems.
